description: A screenshot of a private message / direct-message thread displayed on Donald J. Trump's verified account (header shows the @realDonaldTrump avatar of a stylized American-flag face, the 'Donald J. Trump' name with gold verification badge and a blue medical/plus badge). The conversation is with a contact labeled 'Marty Makary' (an 'M' avatar circle). The single gray message bubble is a resignation letter that reads verbatim: 'Dr. President Trump, Please accept my resignation, effective today. During my tenure, I announced 50 major FDA reforms. Joe Biden's FDA had none. I'm extremely proud that we reduced drug review times from a year to 1-2 months, wrote new guidance to advance psychedelics, introduced a new “plausible mechanism” pathway for rare disease drugs, and changed estrogen labels to tell women the truth about menopausal hormone replacement. It's been the honor of a lifetime to serve as your FDA Commissioner. I am forever grateful. Respectfully, Marty Makary M.D., M.P.H.' The image is a captured chat/text screenshot with no added design, slogans, or graphic styling.
notable_text: Dr. President Trump, Please accept my resignation, effective today... It's been the honor of a lifetime to serve as your FDA Commissioner. ... Marty Makary M.D., M.P.H.
